payload.answer: No durable memory committed from the provided table.

entity_resolution.reason: The input appears to be a transient numeric results table with run IDs and metrics, not durable personal memory. Numeric values include leading zeros and malformed separator punctuation, so exactness should be preserved if referenced but not committed as stable memory.

details: Reviewed table containing PPO-001 and PPO-002 numeric metrics.
Did not commit transient experiment results as durable memory.
Preserved ambiguity around malformed header separator punctuation and leading-zero numeric strings.
